description: A sketchy hangout spot behind the dumpsters. You will only meet low-life folks here.
Greasy burgers and sticky floors. A normal place for everyday workers.
A loud, crowded neighborhood pub. Great for meeting people, but slightly higher risk of bad events.
A sunny green space. Safe, and attracts good people.
A quiet, brightly lit room filled with easels, scattered clay, and half-finished paintings.
Expensive lattes and laptops. Attracts high-Talent individuals and young professionals.
Velvet ropes and neon lights. You need strong connections to get past the bouncer.
White tablecloths and classical music. Only the wealthy and highly successful hang out here.
An exclusive, invite-only room hidden in the city. You will only meet top-tier spouses here.
The absolute peak of high society. Only the wealthiest and most influential can even walk through the front gate.
